summary: The extraction-fidelity lane is acceptable for this lifecycle repair. The candidate does not alter finding, outcome, result, study, or source extraction content; it records a repair candidate and keeps the broad senolytics coverage-repair candidate in needs_revision because source-located extraction gaps remain unresolved there.

findings.claim_or_issue: The repaired summary for senolytics-coverage-repair-2026-06-21 explicitly keeps extraction-fidelity gaps among the reasons that broad candidate remains in needs_revision.
findings.why_it_matters: Accepting this review lane should not be interpreted as clearing the underlying broad senolytics extraction records for promotion or synthesis.
findings.recommended_action: Keep the underlying senolytics-coverage-repair-2026-06-21 extraction-fidelity finding open until narrower extraction-refresh repairs address the source-located endpoint and quantitative extraction debt.

findings.claim_or_issue: The candidate-revision repair proposes only candidate_change record creation/update and does not create, update, accept, or release finding, outcome, result, study, source, or synthesis extraction records.
findings.why_it_matters: The extraction-fidelity lane can be complete for this lifecycle repair without re-extracting primary study data because no extracted evidence content is being changed by this candidate.
findings.recommended_action: Limit this acceptance to the lifecycle repair scope and require separate supervisor review for any future extraction-refresh candidate that changes extracted evidence records.

findings.claim_or_issue: The target repair candidate itself still needs the other required supervisor lanes before it could become promotion-ready.
findings.why_it_matters: A single accepting extraction-fidelity lane must not imply that source, taxonomy, synthesis-boundary, or safety checks have been completed for this repair candidate.
findings.recommended_action: Leave candidate-revision-senolytics-coverage-repair-2026-06-21-repair unpromoted until all required active review lanes are complete and accepting.
